meta.intent: Practice lower-target priority with one crate route tax so water order starts to feel like real play.
meta.expectedPath: Break the lower route crate with the adjacent B clear, open the lower puppy's remaining neighbors, rescue it first, then pivot to the safer upper puppy.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player spends early actions on broad side clears or the upper puppy, making the lower rescue tighter than it needs to be.
meta.whatItProves: A crate can add one meaningful water-route tax without stealing focus from rescue order.
meta.notes: Role: practice. The crate is deliberately a route tax only; dock pressure is present through group remainders but should remain forgiving.
